extDescription.message: Manually sync cookies for the current site to your own server, grouped by channel.

popup_notWebPage.message: This isn't a regular web page — cookies can't be read here.

popup_noChannelHint.message: No channel available yet. Click "Settings" below to create or join one.

popup_cannotGetSite.message: Couldn't read info about the current site.

popup_needSetup.message: No channel available — please finish setup first.

popup_readOnlySuffix.message: This device only has a read-only key and can't upload

popup_readOnlyCannotUpload.message: This device only holds a read-only key and can't upload

options_myChannelsDesc.message: Each channel keeps its own server address — different channels can live on entirely different servers.

options_joinChannelKeyPlaceholder.message: The write key or read-only key from when the channel was created

options_keyTypeHint.message: Getting this wrong isn't a security issue — the server only ever honors what the key itself is allowed to do. Picking the wrong type here just makes the local display and button state inaccurate, and you can change it anytime.

options_labelOptional.message: Label (optional, just for your own reference; defaults to the channel name)

options_registerSecretLabel.message: Registration secret (if the operator set one)

options_rulesDesc.message: Sites without a rule use the default channel above. Add a rule here to route specific sites to a specific channel. Domains match by suffix — e.g. entering jd.com automatically matches all subdomains like order.jd.com and www.jd.com.

options_clickToRevealKey.message: Click to reveal the full key

options_joinFillAll.message: Please fill in the server address, channel name, and channel key.

options_insecureWarning.message: Warning: the server address doesn't start with https:// — cookies and the channel key will be sent in plaintext. Using HTTPS is strongly recommended.

options_needServerUrl.message: Please fill in the server address.

options_needChannelName.message: Please fill in a new channel name.

options_createSuccess.message:
Created successfully!
Server: $SERVER$
Channel name: $NAME$

Write key (saved on this device automatically, can upload + download):
$WRITE_KEY$

Read-only key (download only, not saved on this device):
$READ_KEY$

The server will never show either plaintext key again — back both up somewhere safe (e.g. a password manager) now. If you have another device that should only ever restore cookies and never overwrite them, use "Join an existing channel" there with the read-only key.

options_confirmDeleteChannel.message: Delete channel "$LABEL$"? (This only removes the local record in this extension — data on the server is not affected.)

options_needChannelForRule.message: Please create or join at least one channel first.

options_syncDesc.message: Syncs your channels and keys across browsers via your Chrome account.

options_syncStatusOn.message: On — synced via your Chrome account.

options_syncSeeded.message: Synced. This device's config is now shared.

options_syncAdopted.message: Synced. Loaded config from another device.

options_syncQuotaExceeded.message: Couldn't sync: your channels/rules are too large for Chrome's sync storage limit. Try removing some, or keep sync off.
